Product Features
✅ Flexible Adjustable Lens
Supports 90° horizontal rotation and 180° vertical flip, freely adjust shooting angles to capture every wonderful moment.
✅ Crystal Clear HD Recording
Delivers sharp & vivid HD videos and photos, restores real scene details perfectly.
✅ Perfect Outdoor Companion
Great choice for hiking, traveling and daily outdoor life recording.
✅ Dual-use Mount Design
Bottom reserved mounting hole, easily install desktop stand for stable placement shooting.
✅ 1.97-inch Visual Display
Intuitive screen preview, convenient to frame shots and playback footage.
✅ 1800mAh Long-lasting Battery
Large capacity power supply, supports long-time continuous shooting.

aiTexts: The Pocket POV 4K Camera is a lightweight and compact action camera ideal for capturing hands-free footage during outdoor adventures.
Its magnetic design and multiple mounting accessories allow easy attachment to helmets, bikes, and clothing for versatile use.
With a waterproof case supporting depths up to 131 feet, it’s perfect for water sports like diving and snorkeling.
The camera offers long battery life, providing up to 150 minutes of continuous 1080P recording, and supports recording while charging.
Available in Full HD and 4K versions, it suits vloggers, cyclists, motorcyclists, and sports enthusiasts seeking high-quality, portable video recording.
